title: MARTHA'S FOLX - 211info
text: BRADLEY ANGLE MARTHA'S FOLX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers confidential services such as support groups, resource referrals, safety planning, shelter and housing assistance, and basic needs assistance. Also offers related classes and workshops. Eligibility: Self-identified LGBTQ2+ folks of all genders who have experienced or are experiencing intimate partner violence Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 232-1528 305 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 232-1528 ext 305 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4 and 72 stop at N Killingsworth Street and N Albina Avenue Services: Case/Care Management * Domestic Violence Issues Domestic Violence Support Groups * LGBTQ2+ Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Abused Lesbians/Gay Individuals Specialized Information and Referral * Abused Transgender Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING ASSISTANCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT MUTUAL SUPPORT - HEALING ROOTS & KINSHIP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
